description: RPL messages (DIO/DAO per RFC 6550) with hardcoded independent vectors from spec.

vectors.name: dio_base
vectors.description: Base RPL DIO (RFC 6550). Hardcoded wire format from spec.

vectors.name: bad_icmpv6_checksum
vectors.description: ICMPv6 Echo with corrupted checksum (RFC 4443 §2.3 requires silent discard on checksum failure).
vectors.provenance: RFC 4443 + Python lichen.ipv6.icmpv6.verify_checksum (returns False); independent _internet_checksum oracle. Matches Rust verify_icmpv6_checksum.

vectors.name: short_icmpv6_packet
vectors.description: Truncated ICMPv6 packet after IPv6 header (len < ICMPV6_HEADER_LEN).
vectors.provenance: RFC 4443 §2.3 + Python Icmpv6Message.from_bytes and Rust handle_icmpv6 (returns Ok(None) for short). Independent length checks.
